parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { "values": [[ $json.created_at || $now.toISO(), $json.case_id || '', $json.status || 'paid_intake_received', $json.ops_ready ? 'true' : 'false', $json.recommended_action || '', $json.category || '', $json.name || '', $json.email || '', $json.phone || '', $json.payment_reference || '', $json.sla_deadline_at || '', $json.urgency || '', $json.target_entity || '', $json.diagnosis || '', $json.treatment_needed || '', $json.concrete_request || '', Array.isArray($json.key_dates) ? $json.key_dates.join(' | ') : ($json.key_dates || ''), $json.case_story || '', $json.prior_claim_result || '', $json.ongoing_harm || '', Array.isArray($json.ops_missing_reasons) ? $json.ops_missing_reasons.join(' | ') : ($json.ops_missing_reasons || ''), Array.isArray($json.uploaded_files) ? $json.uploaded_files.map((file) => typeof file === 'string' ? file : (file.name || file.url || JSON.stringify(file))).join(' | ') : ($json.uploaded_files || ''), Array.isArray($json.documents_to_request) ? $json.documents_to_request.join(' | ') : ($json.documents_to_request || ''), $json.public_token || '', $json.invoice_number || '', $json.raffle_code || '' ]] } }}
